codeReview.summary: The implementation aligns with the feature contract: DemoGallery now lists canonical scenarios only (VAL-CROSS-001), DemoScenarioPage Prev/Next traverses canonical scenarios and anchors variants via variantOf (VAL-CROSS-003), and a new regression suite (crossAreaFinalGate.test.tsx) comprehensively validates canonical/variant scenario rendering, raw mode chrome hiding, unknown-route fallback, and paper-reference asset presence (VAL-CROSS-002/004/014/022). The worker transcript and handoff also show successful full-gate validation runs (tsc, vitest >=204, Playwright desktop/mobile, and reference asset checks), with no contract regressions evident in the reviewed diff.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the transcript skeleton and commit 3123956 diff, and found the feature correctly closes the specified cross-area gates without introducing regressions.
